rationale.R1.7: The agent thoroughly audited each citation, flagging errors and inconsistencies with precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainty for claims that could not be verified, such as the Liu & Tang (2024) reference.
rationale.RX.3: The output remained within the scope of the requested task, focusing on citation audit and scholarship.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing constructive feedback for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability.
